children.name: icon_svg
children.label: Icon SVG Code
children.help_text: Paste raw SVG markup for the card icon.
children.default: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='48' height='48' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='2' y='3' width='20' height='14' rx='2'/><line x1='8' y1='21' x2='16' y2='21'/><line x1='12' y1='17' x2='12' y2='21'/></svg>

children.name: description
children.label: Card Description
children.default: Describe the service offering in 2–3 sentences. This text appears on hover.

default.title: Unified User Experience
default.description: Enable digital self-service for customers and employees by delivering web and mobile front-end applications that can run smoothly on any device and integrate seamlessly with all your core systems.

default.title: Legacy Modernisation
default.description: Modernise your existing systems and infrastructure to unlock scalability, reduce technical debt, and position your organisation for long-term digital growth.

default.title: Artificial Intelligence
default.description: Embed AI-driven intelligence into your workflows and products to automate decision-making, surface insights, and create adaptive, personalised experiences at scale.

default.title: Digital Products
default.description: Design and build digital products with end-to-end ownership — from discovery and UX through to deployment — aligned to real user needs and business outcomes.

default.title: Process Digitalisation
default.description: Transform manual and paper-based processes into efficient digital workflows that reduce errors, improve visibility, and free your teams to focus on higher-value work.

default.title: Custom Core Systems
default.description: Build tailored core platforms and back-office systems designed around your specific operational requirements, replacing off-the-shelf limitations with precise, scalable solutions.
